cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 3400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Native runs perfectly fine in X11, but if you're using Wayland you will need to set SDL_VIDEODRIVER=x11 as a launch option if you have SDL_VIDEODRIVER=wayland set as a global environment variable, otherwise it refuses to run.
title: Ion Fury

cpu: AMD Ryzen 5 3400G with Radeon Vega Graphics
notes: Quick follow-up on my previous report - after a bit of searching, the proper solution is to add LD_PRELOAD="/usr/lib/libSDL2.so:/usr/lib32/libSDL2.so:$LD_PRELOAD" as a launch option, as the built-in SDL library for Ion Fury does not support SDL_VIDEODRIVER=wayland. No issues whatsoever.
title: Ion Fury
